subcodes.first_line: Glory be to Thee, O Lord my God! I implore Thee by this Name that hath been hemmed in by tribulations on every side
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بهذا الاسم الذی احاطته البلایا عن کل الجهات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
